description: M1 Warehouse — PDF guideline library (4 tiers, 404 PDFs), AAFP Board Review Questions data (scraper + staging), and warehouse build/maintain scripts. Stores source PDFs and all acquisition/operational scripts that keep the library current.

VC_fail.description: PDFs that have NOT passed the VC gate (session_hy_inserts_v7.json). Destined for local_lite tier after enrichment.

01_local_lite.description: VC_fail PDFs that are fully enriched (extraction + synthesis + enrichment + DOCX complete).

VC_pass.description: PDFs that HAVE passed the VC gate. Destined for right_click tier after enrichment.

03_right_click.description: VC_pass PDFs that are fully enriched (complete right-click pipeline). The highest-value tier.

aafp_brq.description: AAFP Board Review Questions — 135 quiz sets × 10 questions = 1,350 total. Scraped via aafp_brq_scraper.py (Windows-only). Enables AAFP-ITE topic lag analysis.

scripts: aafp_brq_scraper.py — v3 + resume/salvage logic; Windows-only (VM proxy blocks outbound HTTPS)
aafp_cookies.json — 38 auth cookies; REFRESH BEFORE EACH RUN (session cookies)
aafp_quiz_map.json — 135 quiz sets (assessment_id → quiz_title mapping)
aafp_explore_dump.txt — Q49733 explore mode reference output
scraper.warning: DO NOT poll staging file from VM while scraper is running — causes FUSE oplock conflict, freezes Windows write

staging.note: 1,221 of 1,350 expected (129 missing from ~13 incomplete quizzes — FUSE oplock stall). Gap-fill pass deferred.

aafp_brq.db_table: aafp_questions (1,221 rows; aafp_qid = 'AAFP-{question_id}'; separate from ITE questions table)

naming_convention: Author_Year#@#ART-XXXX@#@.pdf — ART-ID embedded between #@# start codon and @#@ stop codon
vc_gate: key_data_files/session_hy_inserts_v7.json (352 citations) — sole criterion for right_click vs local_lite tier assignment

build.description: Full DB rebuild sequence (9 scripts, self-contained). Run in order for a clean build. Assume DB does NOT exist yet.
scripts: build_clean_question_bank.py — Step 1: Excel → ite_questions_clean.json
rebuild_ite_db_v2.py — Step 2: core DB from JSON (2020–2025)
extract_ite_2018_2019.py — Step 3: extract 2018-2019 from split PDFs
enrich_ite_questions.py — Step 4: Claude API enrichment for 2018-2019
integrate_2018_2019.py — Step 5: merge 2018-2019 into DB
backfill_keywords_2018_2019.py — Step 6: keyword backfill for 2018-2019 (moved from M2 2026-03-27)
validate_db_v2.py — Step 7: post-build QC
compute_embeddings.py — Step 8: vector embeddings (--new-only for incremental)
validate_vector_search.py — Step 9: post-embedding QC

maintain.description: Operational / recurring scripts. Assume DB exists and has data. Run as needed.
scripts: aafp_cleanup_filenames.py — fix ALL-CAPS author names
aafp_fill_gaps.py — download missing AAFP PDFs
aafp_retry_playwright.py — paywalled PDF fallback
aafp_retry_selenium.py — Selenium fallback
aafp_top20_downloader.py — top-20 article downloader
aafp_vc_batch_download.py — batch VC article downloader
audit_engine_type_changes.py — detect engine_type changes across runs
backfill_new_article_metadata.py — fill missing metadata for new article records
build_clinical_pathways.py — Layer 3: clinical_pathways table builder
build_crosswalk_index.py — scans codons → crosswalk_index.json
build_match_staging.py — proposes ART-ID matches for unmatched PDFs
build_topic_trends.py — Layer 4a: trend CSVs
match_tiers_to_library.py — scans warehouse PDFs vs ReferenceTiers CSV → match_summary.csv
preprocess_concept_tags.py — concept_tags via API (moved from M2 2026-03-27)
rebuild_acquisition_list.py — match_summary → confirmed_present.csv + ranked acquisition XLSX
rename_tier_labels_in_db.py — bulk tier label updates in DB
rename_to_codon.py — executes approved codon renames

database.note: DB lives in 00_database/, not in M1. M1 scripts reach it via PROJECT_ROOT / '00_database' / 'db' / 'ite_intelligence.db'

baton_015_20260327: Added aafp_brq/ directory with scraper/ and staging/ subdirectories
aafp_brq_scraper.py v3: discover/scrape/explore modes, resume logic with truncated-JSON salvage, FUSE oplock fix documented
aafp_cookies.json, aafp_quiz_map.json, aafp_explore_dump.txt added to scraper/
baton_014_20260327: M1 build/ is now a self-contained 9-step rebuild sequence
preprocess_concept_tags.py moved from M2 → M1/maintain/ (recurring operation)
baton_006_20260324: Added match_tiers_to_library.py to maintain/ (migrated from TEMP_05)
